source_note: Currency confirmed: S&P stated directly that the Money Manager Database defaults to USD platform-wide for exported asset values (a local-currency view exists only in the Firm Profile screen, not in exports). These figures are USD. Category mapping and plan-type routing reused the established rule set from prior builds; no unresolved judgement calls for this country. Categories/institutions excluded from all pension segments (Reserve Banks and similar non-pension pools, or institutions with no DB/DC/E&F breakdown reported): none material. 2 institutions tracked, $53.9bn tracked across all segments.
scorecard_note: Not yet scored — none of the 12 opportunity-scorecard dimensions have been filled in for any Argentina segment. Sign in and use the matrix below to start scoring; see Sources & Methodology for the scoring convention and Overall formula.
allocation_note: Built the same real-bottom-up way as every other country: summed actual plan-level AA lines into the six standard buckets, with ambiguous plan types (Investment Pool Funds, Hybrid DB/DC Plan, Other Retirement Fund) ratio-split across each institution's actual segments using the two-pass double-count-avoidance logic, and explicitly-named pools (Sovereign Wealth Fund, Endowment Fund, Foundation Fund Or Investment Pool, Other Tax-exempt Fund) routed directly. Same 5%-of-asset-type materiality threshold for style breakdowns.

source_history.detail: Initial segment build — Bottom-up (S&P Money Manager Database export).
